metadata.extractionNote: v4.9.0 full KSB domestic PDF re-extraction using table-aware parsers. Borewell tables now use kW/HP/stage/NRV/flow-head columns explicitly; surface and sewage tables use correct LPM/LPH/m3/hr units.
metadata.unitRule: All internal flows stored as LPH. KSB LPM values are multiplied by 60; KSB LPH values are kept as-is; KSB m3/hr values are multiplied by 1000.
metadata.qaFix: Corrected KSB stage/model extraction issue where head/flow values could be mistaken as ST stage numbers.
